note: Large plan: torch 2.8->aimdo fast loads + externalize start.sh/wrapper to R2. Root cause CONFIRMED live (torch<2.8 disables aimdo v0.4.10). Sequenced externalize-first.

summary: Implementation started — Phase 1 externalize start.sh/wrapper to R2.
Derived 3 phase-level checklist items from plan.md.

Phase 1 code+infra done: cubric-pod-runtime bucket + pod.cubric.studio live; bootstrap.sh/publish-runtime.sh + Dockerfile CMD swap; 4 local fetch-path cases PASS; current runtime published to stable/. Pending the one user-gated rebuild for live no-rebuild-reload proof.

Namespaced runtime under vision/ prefix (pod.cubric.studio shared infra). Re-published to vision/stable/, GCd old top-level. Updated gotchas.md (3 entries), build-pod-image doc, README, memory. Kicking the bootstrap-shipping rebuild.

v0.10.2 built+pushed all 3 profiles, pull-verified public. Bootstrap fetch PROVEN in real cu128+cu124 images (installed fetched, not baked); no-rebuild-reload proven via test channel. Caught+fixed cu124-base-lacks-curl (commit 21bc929). README shipped tag -> v0.10.2 (7c006fb). PENDING: push 21bc929+7c006fb (gated) + live-Pod GPU verify.

v0.10.3-cu128 built+pushed+public (digest 10ab98c). torch 2.8.0+cu128 + sage sm_120 verified; bootstrap (Phase 1) intact (curl present, fetch works). Both phases in one image. Ready for live 4090 Pod test: watch boot log for aimdo enabled (not the <2.8 fallback) + load time drop. App pin v0.10.3 (3a43c20-line). cu124-broad base decided after this proof.

Phase 2 live round 1: torch-2.8 aimdo REMOVED --normalvram -> old start.sh crash-looped the 5090 (exit 2). Fixed (R2 push, no rebuild): start.sh drops the vram flag (aimdo manages), wrapper 0.2.18 skips empty flag w/ legacy sentinel. Published to vision/stable (start_sha 323ca6b). Gotcha logged. PENDING: next 5090 (last reclaimed on stop) re-fetches fixed start.sh -> aimdo-init + fast-load proof.

note: Option A (cu126 guts) live-proven on 4090 (drv 580) + A4500 (drv 550): aimdo inits, fast dynamic-VRAM loads, image+video complete server-side, driver-floor lowered. Phases 1+2 done. SSE/completion-hang filed separately.

summary: PERF SIDE-QUEST RESOLVED (live, 5090 Pod 2026-06-28): cloud LTX slowness = ONE-TIME COLD-LOAD TAX, not per-gen. Cold ~209s; WARM 36s (1s 704p, beats local). 40GB stays resident after first fault. Cause = RunPod 8MB RLIMIT_MEMLOCK cap (not raisable via API) + per-page fault mechanism. ALL fixes disproven: bigger VRAM, torch bump, disk, --disable-async-offload, --disable-pinned-memory, fp8 (faces), downgrade (0.25.1 has aimdo too). TWO OPTIMIZATIONS for a follow-up card: (1) warm-on-connect (fire throwaway gen post-connect, hide the cold tax, app-side); (2) remove MpiClearVram node 58 from LTX_t2v_stage2.json (re-faults 40GB at stage-2 even warm) — UNTESTED, needs 24GB VRAM-peak check. Resolution banner at top of docs/builder/research/pod-perf-investigation.md + gotchas.md perf entry + MEMORY.md MPI-156 line all updated.
Archived from done column to .agents/mpi-kanban/tasks/_archive/MPI-156/ (board cleanup).
